<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Lcobucci\JWT\Token; use function array_key_exists; final class DataSet { /** @param array<non-empty-string, mixed> $data */ public function __construct(private readonly array $data, private readonly string $encoded) { } /** @param non-empty-string $name */ public function get(string $name, mixed $default = null): mixed { return $this->data[$name] ?? $default; } /** @param non-empty-string $name */ public function has(string $name): bool { return array_key_exists($name, $this->data); } /** @return array<non-empty-string, mixed> */ public function all(): array { return $this->data; } public function toString(): string { return $this->encoded; } }
